extraction.one_line_summary: PINOT Thibaut attacked on late climb, gapped NIBALI Vincenzo and others through repeated accelerations with 14km remaining
tactical_patterns: PINOT used 4-6 serial accelerations on climb to crack NIBALI rather than single explosive move, succeeding around 14km out.
FORMOLO Davide initially animated breakaway with stage-winner form from Tour, forcing others to chase early on climbing.

rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: serial acceleration tactic on final climb proved more effective than single attack against Nibali
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: unable to follow PINOT's repeated tempo increases despite positioning at group front before decisive move
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: neutral: showed Tour stage winner form with early climb attack but faded when decisive moves came
